versions.version_description: Corrected Chords in verse, chorus, and bridge.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Verse 1:

[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
its amazing how u knock me of my feet ohhh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
everytime  u come around me i get weak[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]             [ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
aint nobody ever made me feel this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]             [ch]C#[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]   
u kiss my lips and then u take my breath away[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Ebm[/ch]
so i wanna know[/tab]

Chorus
[tab]([ch]Ebm[/ch])   [ch]C#[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]  ([ch]Bm[/ch])
i wanna know what turns u on[/tab]
so i can be all that and more
id like to know what makes u cry 
[tab]       [ch]Abm7[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]
so i can be the one who makes u smile[/tab]

verse 2
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]                  [ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]
girl he never understood what u were worth[/tab]
and he never took the time to make it work
baby im the type of to show concern
anyway that i can pls you let me learn
so i wanna know

repeat chorus


bridge x2
[tab]      ([ch]Ebm[/ch])                [ch]C#[/ch]                  
tell me what i got to do to pls u[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
baby anything u say ill do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm[/ch]               [ch]C#[/ch]
cause i only wanna make u happy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
from the bottom of my heart its true[/tab]

verse 3
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]                        [ch]C#[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]
i wish that i could take a journey through your mind[/tab]
and find emotions u always try to hide babe
i do believe that theres a love u wanna share
ill take good care of u lady have no fear
so i wanna know

chorus

bridge x2

chorus fade
